seoTitle: Grassy Head vs Grattai — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Grassy Head vs Grattai: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Grassy Head and Grattai.
heading: Grassy Head vs Grattai — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Grassy Head, New South Wales and Grattai, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Grattai has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Grassy Head (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Grassy Head or Grattai safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Grassy Head has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Grattai scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Grassy Head scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Grattai scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Grassy Head or Grattai?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Grattai has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
